name: ZenNami
description: ZenNami brings lo-fi radio and ambient soundscapes as browser extension. Developed using the browser-wxt package to streamline cross-browser compability development. The radio stations are powered by the Radio Browser Network and features station management via liking and hiding stations, adding 8 different ambient textures to zone in, and using browser storage so data is private to the user.
